home.title: What About A World
home.tagline: Plan your own trip - no travel agency, no chaos.
home.description: Our AI assistant guides you step by step through planning your whole trip: from picking a destination, through flights, accommodation and local transport, to your itinerary and packing list.
home.featureAssistantText: Walks you through a proven, step-by-step trip planning system.
home.featureCalculatorText: A rough estimate of flights, accommodation, transport and activities.
home.featureBlogText: Practical tips and stories from real trips you can actually use.

blog.title: Blog
blog.empty: Articles are on their way - check back soon for our first tips and trip reports.

calculator.title: Trip cost calculator
calculator.description: Get a rough budget estimate for your trip. This calculator is still under construction.
calculator.comingSoon: The real calculation is coming in a future version.

assistant.title: AI trip-planning assistant
assistant.description: The assistant guides you through planning your trip - from picking a destination to packing your bag.
assistant.emailGateNotice: The assistant is free - we'll just ask for your email before your first use.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Tell us where you'd like to go...
assistant.placeholderMessage: The AI assistant is still being built. Soon we'll be planning your next trip together, step by step 🌍
